exercises.sentence: Todos los días, yo _______ las llaves sobre la mesa.
exercises.translation: Every day, I leave the keys on the table.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ mi ropa en el suelo cuando llego a casa.
exercises.translation: I leave my clothes on the floor when I get home.

exercises.sentence: Yo siempre _______ una propina cuando voy a ese restaurante.
exercises.translation: I always leave a tip when I go to that restaurant.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué _______ tu mochila en la entrada siempre?
exercises.translation: Why do you always leave your backpack in the entryway?

exercises.sentence: Tú _______ a tu perro solo por muchas horas.
exercises.translation: You leave your dog alone for many hours.

exercises.sentence: Si tú _______ de fumar, te sentirás mucho mejor.
exercises.translation: If you quit smoking, you will feel much better.

exercises.sentence: Ayer yo _______ mi libro en la biblioteca por error.
exercises.translation: Yesterday I left my book in the library by mistake.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ de trabajar a las cinco de la tarde.
exercises.translation: I stopped working at five in the afternoon.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ una nota para mis padres en la cocina.
exercises.translation: I left a note for my parents in the kitchen.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué _______ las ventanas abiertas ayer?
exercises.translation: Why did you leave the windows open yesterday?

exercises.sentence: Tú _______ de estudiar cuando sonó el teléfono.
exercises.translation: You stopped studying when the phone rang.

exercises.sentence: Ayer tú _______ las luces encendidas al salir.
exercises.translation: Yesterday you left the lights on when leaving.

exercises.sentence: Cuando era niño, yo siempre _______ mis juguetes afuera.
exercises.translation: When I was a child, I always used to leave my toys outside.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ que mi hermano jugara con mis cosas.
exercises.translation: I used to let my brother play with my things.

exercises.sentence: Antes, yo _______ de hacer ejercicio los fines de semana.
exercises.translation: Before, I used to stop exercising on weekends.

exercises.sentence: Tú _______ que tus amigos entraran sin permiso.
exercises.translation: You used to let your friends enter without permission.

exercises.sentence: Tú _______ las ventanas abiertas todas las noches.
exercises.translation: You used to leave the windows open every night.

exercises.sentence: Tú _______ de comer carne cuando tenías veinte años.
exercises.translation: You used to stop eating meat when you were twenty.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ este trabajo si encontrara algo mejor.
exercises.translation: I would quit this job if I found something better.

exercises.sentence: Yo te _______ mis apuntes si los necesitaras.
exercises.translation: I would leave you my notes if you needed them.

exercises.sentence: Yo nunca _______ a mi familia en una situación difícil.
exercises.translation: I would never leave my family in a difficult situation.

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú _______ de hablarle a un amigo por un error?
exercises.translation: Would you stop talking to a friend over a mistake?

exercises.sentence: Tú _______ tu ciudad si tuvieras una oportunidad mejor.
exercises.translation: Would you leave your city if you had a better opportunity?

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú _______ el coche aquí si fueras tú?
exercises.translation: Would you leave the car here if you were you?

exercises.sentence: Mañana yo _______ las llaves con el portero.
exercises.translation: Tomorrow I will leave the keys with the doorman.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ de trabajar pronto para ir a la fiesta.
exercises.translation: I will stop working soon to go to the party.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ un regalo en tu escritorio antes de salir.
exercises.translation: I will leave a gift on your desk before leaving.

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú _______ el paquete en la recepción mañana?
exercises.translation: Will you leave the package at the reception tomorrow?

exercises.sentence: Tú _______ de fumar cuando empieces el tratamiento.
exercises.translation: You will stop smoking when you start the treatment.

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú _______ la puerta cerrada al irte?
exercises.translation: Will you leave the door closed when you leave?
